prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4B11T (from Lancer Evolution X) with a forged internals build (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 28 psi on E85 fuel, paired with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise boost control and ignition mapping.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Cusco 2-way LSD for the rear axle, PTT 4.88:1 ring & pinion gear set (for the Super Select 4WD system), and a Tilton triple-plate ceramic clutch with a billet flywheel to handle the increased torque (target: 550 lb-ft at the wheels).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping) and custom valving for the Montero Sport’s multi-link rear setup, paired with Eibach Pro-Street Sway Bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and Whiteline adjustable end links to eliminate body roll during aggressive off-road or track use.
estetica: Rocket Bunny P-Type widebody kit (Montero Sport-specific, not a generic SUV kit) with custom carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, all finished in a matte vinyl wrap (3M 2080 Gloss Black) with red pinstriping.

Custom front bumper replacement with a JDM-spec Mitsubishi Pajero Evolution (V55W) grille and LED bar integration (Baja Designs Squadron Pro), paired with a custom rear bumper featuring a dual-exit exhaust setup (custom 3.5-inch titanium tips by Burns Stainless).

Interior overhaul with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (recliners removed for fixed-back racing setup), Takata 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage (Chassisworks 4130 chromoly) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Dashboard replaced with a Motec C127 digital dash and a custom center console housing a hydraulic handbrake (Wilwood master cylinder) and a quick-shift lever (B&M Short Throw) for the automatic transmission.
